name: receipt
description: Cryptographic receipt chain for every agent run. Proves what the agent did, scored by an independent reviewer.
author: MorkeethHQ

enabled.description: Enable receipt generation for all agent runs

httpRoute.description: Base HTTP path for chain retrieval

axlForward.description: Forward completed chains via Gensyn AXL

axlPeerId.description: AXL peer ID to forward chains to
